questions.question: Your question text here
questions.notes: Optional notes about what makes this question tricky or what a great answer includes

_schema_notes.difficulty: One of: easy, medium, hard, expert
_schema_notes.subcategory: Free-form. Examples: improvement, design, strategy, behavioral, estimation
_schema_notes.company_tags: Array of company names this question is associated with, or ['generic']
_schema_notes.framework_tags: Array of frameworks relevant to answering (circles, rice, star, jtbd, etc.)
_schema_notes.time_limit_minutes: Recommended time for answering. Typical: 5-10 for product, 2-3 for behavioral
_schema_notes.follow_ups: Common follow-up questions an interviewer might ask
